Part.Source: Event Start /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName &NfeProTer = nullvalue(&NfeProTer) &NfeSts = nullvalue(&NfeSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'MONITORA NOTAS TERCEIROS' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if &NfeDtaFat.IsEmpty() &NfeDtaFat_To = serverdate() &NfeDtaFat = &NfeDtaFat_To.AddDays(-30) Endif EndEvent Event Refresh retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWNOTAS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount NfeSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' NfeEntSai.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &bewupdate = !'' &sdsd.Clear() &sdsd.AddItem(0, 'O Que Fazer') If (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA and not NfeNum.IsEmpty()) &sdsd.AddItem(1, 'Consultar NFe') Endif If (&AutNiv > 2) &sdsd.AddItem(2, 'Clonar NFe') Endif If (not NfeChv.IsEmpty()) &sdsd.AddItem(3, 'Exportar XML') Endif If ((NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS and &AutNiv > 2) or (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA and (&AutNiv > 3 or NfeNum.IsEmpty()))) &sdsd.AddItem(4, 'Excluir NF') Endif If &sdsd.Count = 1 &sdsd.Class = !'Invisible' Else &sdsd.Class = !'Attribute' EndIf &ImprimirDanfe = !'' If ((NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA) or (NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS and not NfeArqXml.IsEmpty())) &ImprimirDanfe.Class = !'Attribute' Else &ImprimirDanfe.Class = !'Invisible' Endif if NfeCliRaz.Length() > 40 &gridNfeCliRaz = substr(upper(NfeCliRaz),1,37) + '...' Else &gridNfeCliRaz = NfeCliRaz EndIF &gridNfeLctNom = trim(str(NfeLctCod)) + '-'+ Substr(NfeLctNom, 1, 15) Do Case Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada NfeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada NfeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Denegada NfeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case NfeSts = Status_NFe.Inutilizada NfeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise NfeSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase Do Case Case NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada NfeEntSai.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida NfeEntSai.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Otherwise NfeEntSai.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &sdsd.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &sdsd = 1 Do 'Do ConsultarSefaz' Case &sdsd = 2 Do 'Do ClonarNFe' Case &sdsd = 3 Do 'Do ExportarXML' Case &sdsd = 4 Do 'Do ExcluirNFe' EndCase &sdsd = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' &WizardData.Capa.FilCod = 0 &WizardData.Capa.NfeCod = 0 &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod = 0 &WizardData.Capa.DeOndeVem = 'WWNOTASTERCEIROS' //&WizardData.Capa.SolCod = 0 &WebSession.Set('wpNota_Data', &WizardData.ToJson()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpNota.Call('', 'Capa', false) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwwNotasTerceiros.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportwwNotasTerceiros.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConsultarSefaz' GravaConsultaSEFAZ.Call('WWNOTASTERCEIROS', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) wpConsultaSefazNota.Link('WWNOTASTERCEIROS', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &SolCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ClonarNFe' wpClonarNFe.Link('WWNOTAS', EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExportarXML' &NfeArqXml = RetornaXmlNota.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) if &NfeArqXml.IsEmpty() GeraXmlNFeModelo55_4.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 'N', &Context.PesCod, 'E', &SolCod) EndIF retornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, &sdtConfiguracoesPasta) &Nome_arquivo = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis.Trim() +NfeChv+ '.xml' &XmlWriter.Open(&Nome_arquivo) &XmlWriter.WriteRawText(&NfeArqXml) &XmlWriter.Close() &Nome_arquivo = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempVir.Trim() +NfeChv+'.xml' Link(&Nome_arquivo) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExcluirNFe' wpExcluirNFe.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFENUM" &NfeNum.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEPEDCOD" &NfePedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFECOD" &NfeCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFECLICOD" &NfeCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFECLIRAZ" &NfeCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"EMPCOD" &EmpCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEPROTER" &NfeProTer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFESTS" &NfeSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEDTAFAT" &NfeDtaFat.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &NfeDtaFat_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NFEDTAEMS" &NfeDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &NfeDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFENUM", "", not &NfeNum.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeNum.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFEPEDCOD", "", not &NfePedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfePedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFECOD", "", not &NfeCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFECLICOD", "", not &NfeCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFECLIRAZ", "", not &NfeCliRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeCliRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"EMPCOD", "", not &EmpCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &EmpCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFEPROTER", "", not &NfeProTer.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeProTer, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFESTS", "", not &NfeSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &NfeSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFEDTAFAT", "", not (&NfeDtaFat.IsEmpty() AND &NfeDtaFat_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &NfeDtaFat.ToString().Trim(), &NfeDtaFat_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NFEDTAEMS", "", not (&NfeDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &NfeDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &NfeDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &NfeDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Notas" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &bewupdate.Click &WizardData.Capa.FilCod = FilCod &WizardData.Capa.NfeCod = NfeCod &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod = EmpCod &WizardData.Capa.DeOndeVem = 'WWNOTASTERCEIROS' //&WizardData.Capa.SolCod = 0 &WebSession.Set('wpNota_Data', &WizardData.ToJson()) wpNota.Link('', 'Capa', false) EndEvent Event &ImprimirDanfe.Click &NfeArqXml = RetornaXmlNota.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod) if &NfeArqXml.IsEmpty() GeraXmlNFeModelo55_4.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, 'N', &Context.PesCod, 'E', &SolCod) EndIF GeraPdfDanfe.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod, &UrlPDF, &UrlFisico) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = Link(&UrlPDF) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
